videos.title: Agents vs Workflows in Copilot Studio
videos.description: In this video, I go through the differences between Agents and Workflows in Copilot Studio.  I explain how each of them work and when and why you should use them.  I also give a demo of how you can leverage them and even how to use them together to get even greater capabilities.

videos.title: Where Is Agent Dude
videos.description: In this video, I explain where I have been and what the future of Agent Dude looks like.  It is super exciting and the educational content is coming... promise had to get the studio back up and running, but this video was done in the studio and we are now ready to start bringing full content again!

videos.title: I Put 11 Power BI Tips to The EXPERT Test
videos.description:
After watching this video, you'll be able to apply practical Power BI tips that improve your data modeling, report building, and overall Power BI project efficiency.

This video presents 11 ranked Power BI tips that range from turning off auto date time to using field parameters for dynamic visuals. Patrick LeBlanc demonstrates how to replace nested IF statements with SWITCH TRUE for clearer DAX, leverage Power Query parameters for environment flexibility, and organize measures into a dedicated

videos.title: Can Fabric Apps REPLACE Power BI? Think Twice Before You Delete Your Reports
videos.description:
Learn how to quickly create data-driven applications using Fabric Apps and the Fabricator tool, simplifying app development with your Power BI semantic model.

In this video, Patrick LeBlanc explores Fabric Apps and the Fabricator tool, demonstrating how developers can rapidly build data-driven applications connected to Power BI semantic models. He walks through installing the Fabricator, creating a new project, and using AI-powered prompts to generate app pages with interactive filters and visu

videos.title: Power BI’s Future Isn’t About Drag-and-Drop
videos.description: While the canvas may change—whether it becomes an app or tools like Power BI—the core skill set remains essential: knowing the data, understanding the user, telling a compelling story, and having a strong eye for what looks good.

videos.title: When the Report Canvas Disappears
videos.description: What happens when traditional report boundaries disappear and you’re no longer limited by the Power BI report canvas?

videos.title: A 3-person team vs 50-person agency #AI #FutureOfWork #agency
videos.description:
For twenty years, size was the signal. A bigger agency meant more capacity, more safety, more reasons to trust them with the work. That signal is breaking. When a handful of people with good tools can turn around the same volume of work, the client starts doing math they never used to do, and the big team's headcount stops looking like strength and starts looking like the reason the invoice is so high.

The small shop will not win on reputation, and it does not need to. It wins on being faster,

videos.title: The real problem with AI #aiagents #Claude #OpenClaw #productivity
videos.description:
If you use more than one AI tool, you already know this feeling even if you have never named it. Every tool is great at one slice of the work, and you are the one shuttling context from one to the next all day. You copy the output here, paste it there, re-explain what you are doing for the fifth time. The models got powerful, and you quietly became the integration layer.

Nobody handed you that job, but you are doing it, and it is the real reason your AI setup feels busy without ever feeling fas

videos.title: Fable 5 And GPT-5.6 Don't Need Better Prompts. They Need A Clean Setup.
videos.description:
Full post w/ Clean Your Harness Guide: https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/ai-harness-audit?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true

Your new AI model is running on instructions you wrote for the old one. This is the AI harness audit: how to find the hidden setup shaping your AI and clean it safely.

I mapped every skill, memory, system prompt, permission, and check around my own AI and found 66 skill routes and 172 instruction files quietly slowing the m

videos.title: we can do better than knowledge graphs
AI Optimism vs AI Pessimism
videos.description:
AI discourse now balances cautious optimism against persistent doomsday narratives. A Stanford-led statement calls for focused study of AI's economic transformation and pragmatic policy preparation. Proposals range from voluntary frontier-model standards with pre-release testing to international coordination, yet critics warn regulatory tools could empower state surveillance.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news and discussions in AI. 
Subscribe to the podcast version

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Explicit recording consent for PSTN participants now available in GCC High and DoD
items.description: We are introducing explicit recording consent support for PSTN participants joining Microsoft Teams meetings in GCC High and DoD environments. This feature is already available in Public and GCC clouds and is now being extended to sovereign environments. After this rollout, when a meeting is being recorded or transcribed, PSTN participants will be prompted to provide explicit consent before they can unmute and participate. If consent is not provided, participants will remain muted for the durati

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Session and Response Sharing in M365 Copilot
items.description: Session and Response Sharing let Microsoft 365 Copilot users share Copilot chat content through a link. Session Sharing shares a full chat session, while Response Sharing shares a single Copilot response. The shared content opens as a read-only view, and recipients can continue from it in their own Copilot chat. This gives Copilot users an easier and more controlled way to share useful Copilot outputs with coworkers instead of copying and pasting. It helps teams reuse work, share context, and co

items.title: OneDrive: Exclude specific folders from syncing
items.description: OneDrive for Windows and Mac will let users exclude specific folders from syncing, so folders that do not belong in the cloud, such as developer tooling folders like PowerShell modules, Visual Studio configuration, and node modules, stay local on the device instead of uploading to OneDrive. Administrators can define folder exclusion rules for their organization.

items.title: OneDrive: Block screen capture for sensitivity-labeled PDFs in the OneDrive and SharePoint web viewer
items.description: The OneDrive and SharePoint web PDF viewer will block screen capture in Microsoft Edge when users open PDFs whose sensitivity (MIP) label without Copy (EXTRACT) permission.

items.title: Microsoft Edge: Upgraded Copilot new tab page
items.description: Search, chat, and explore the web from one search box with Copilot-suggested actions and curated work content to help your users get things done faster on the Copilot new tab page. Users will see upgraded Copilot new tab page functionality and features.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Queues app for Microsoft Teams in GCC High and DoD
items.description: We’re excited to announce that the Queues app is now available in the GCC High and DoD clouds. This Teams-native app helps organizations manage customer engagements more efficiently by bringing advanced call queue and auto attendant capabilities directly into Teams. Queues app is a Teams Premium feature. For more information about Queues app, including licensing information, please see Manage Queues app for Microsoft Teams in your organization.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Granular channel notification controls
items.description: Microsoft Teams introduces flexible presets for channel notifications, allowing you to choose between All new messages, @mentions and replies, or Mute. You can further customize alerts for unfollowed threads, tags, and channel or team mentions, as well as control banner notifications for the channel. This added flexibility enables you to set notifications to match to your work style and reduce unnecessary distractions.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Ability to separate out the Townhall attendee invites
items.description: This backend change will now address the 'separation of attendee' invites from the events crew. This feature allows the organizers of Townhalls to maintain separate invites for attendees.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Copilot in Teams can analyze content shared on-screen during a meeting
items.description: Copilot in Teams can analyze content shared on-screen during a meeting when recording is enabled. This, along with meeting transcript and meeting chat, enables users to ask Copilot to summarize or find specific information from screen-shared content (e.g., ‘Which products had the highest sales?’), consolidate insights across both the conversation and presentation (e.g., 'What was the feedback per slide?'), and draft new content based on the entire meeting (e.g., 'Rewrite the paragraph shared on

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Teams shared display mode and peripheral detection available for DoD environments
items.description: Shared display mode in Teams is now available in government DOD environments, enabling more seamless and private meeting hosting from your PC. Additionally, peripheral detection for bring-your-own-device spaces is available for inventory management and reporting through the Pro Management portal.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Agent 365 Dashboard in Insights
items.description: Customers can now access their Agent 365 data through the Agent Dashboard in Copilot Analytics (Insights), enabling leaders to understand activity across all agents registered through Agent 365. Customers with Agent 365 and Copilot will now see the Agent 365 Dashboard with the ability to view historical data in Agent Dashboard.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Expand presenter visibility in 'Manage what attendees see' for Teams events
items.description: Users will now be able to resize and expand the presenter panel in 'Manage what attendees see' options for Teams events. This feature helps make it easier to view, manage, and switch between presenters during events.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Enhanced live captions settings and right-side panel view
items.description:
We are improving the live captions experience in Microsoft Teams with new viewing layouts and streamlined configuration options. Users can now view live captions in a new right-side panel, in addition to the existing options of viewing them at the top or bottom of the screen, or popping them out into a separate window.
We are also making it easier to manage caption settings directly within the meeting. By clicking the existing gear icon in the live captions pane, users will see a consolidated me

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Multilingual recap available with translation button
items.description: After meeting recap is automatically generated in the translation language chosen during the meeting, users can continue to change the language of the meeting recap after its generated.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: View and manage auto attendant shared voicemails directly in the Queues app
items.description: Calls to an Auto Attendant that are routed to voicemail will now appear directly within Queues app. This enables organizations to manage shared Auto Attendant voicemails in a centralized experience, making it easier for teams to track, triage, and respond to customer messages.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: External presenters can access production controls for Teams events
items.description: Organizations can allow external presenters to manage Teams events by granting them access to production controls. Federated (B2B) and guest users can be specified in the "Who has control of production tools" setting, enabling trusted external presenters to run events and manage what attendees see. This feature supports organizations that work with third-party event producers and vendors.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - AI Powered Data Loss Prevention Policy Optimizer
items.description: DLP Policy Optimizer uses AI to analyze your organization’s DLP policies, rule structure, and activity signals to identify optimization opportunities that are difficult to detect manually. It highlights overlapping rules, redundant conditions, misconfigurations, and sources of excessive noise, and presents prioritized recommendations with supporting evidence and suggested actions. This enables you to reduce false positives and alert noise, improve policy precision, and simplify policy management

items.title: Outlook: Emails marked with External to be supported as Rules conditions
items.description: The External tag on an email, set by the ExternalInOutlook feature, will now be usable as a condition in Outlook Inbox Rules. This change also makes available the ability to create or modify these Rules on the new Outlook for Windows, Outlook Web, and Outlook for Mac.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Preloaded video for Teams Events and Meetings
items.description: Users can now upload videos directly into a Teams event or meeting from OneDrive from the "Manage view" options when an organizer has turned on Manage What Attendees See mode. This ensures a smoother high quality video playback with a more consistent experience for attendees.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): SharePoint list support in Agent Builder
items.description: Agent Builder now supports using a SharePoint list as a knowledge source for agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot. Makers can ground an agent in structured list data so users can ask questions and get responses based on information stored in a selected SharePoint list. For this release, each agent can reference one SharePoint list with up to 20,000 items, alongside other knowledge source types. Support for list attachments and lookup columns is not yet available.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Town hall media optimization for VDI attendees
items.description:
What’s new
Teams now supports audio and video offloading for Town hall attendees in VDI environments that are using the new optimization. Media streams are offloaded directly to the user’s local device, improving performance and delivering a high definition viewing experience while reducing virtual desktop resource usage.
Who it applies to
•	Windows endpoints only using the new VDI optimization
•	Supported VDI platforms:
o	Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365
o	Citrix
o	Omnissa
o	Amazon WorkSpa

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Power user insights in Copilot dashboard
items.description: Understand who is building a habit using Copilot with the new power user insights in Copilot dashboard

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Find meetings based on topics and keywords
items.description: Copilot will be able to find meetings based on topics or keywords from relevant data like meeting body, chat and transcription.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention – Reduce policy sync status SLA on the Purview UI from 2 hours to 30 mins
items.description: Admin should be able to see the Endpoint DLP policy sync status on the Purview portal within 30 mins.

items.title: Built‑in AI Interpreter for Calls on Teams Phone Devices
items.description: With AI Interpreter, Teams Phone Devices provide real‑time language interpretation directly within the call experience. Users can participate naturally in multilingual conversations while the device interprets spoken audio, reducing language barriers and supporting clearer communication in everyday calling scenarios.

items.title: Microsoft 365: New profile cards for buildings, rooms and desks
items.description: Buildings, rooms and desks that are added to the Places directory will have new profile cards, accessible from Copilot Chat and across other Microsoft 365 entry points.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Engage: Detect moderated themes in images
items.description: Engages theme moderation feature is a powerful AI tool to monitor and moderate content. With this update, images can now match to themes, just like text.

items.title: SharePoint: Microsoft 365 Archive file-level archiving
items.description: This introduces archiving at the file level for Microsoft 365 Archive.

items.title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - Trigger Power automate workflows as outcome of DLP rule match
items.description: This introduces a new DLP rule action to trigger custom Power automate workflows when a DLP rule is violated.
